title: klasea lasiocephala
intro: Klasea lasiocephala, also known as Chinese artichoke, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Boraginaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Klasea lasiocephala include improving digestion, reducing blood pressure, and enhancing immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used as a food ingredient in some Asian cuisines.
